Class SchemaBehaviour

Namespace
ISILab.LBS.Plugin.Components.Behaviours
Assembly
LBS.dll
[RequieredModule(new Type[] { typeof(TileMapModule), typeof(ConnectedTileMapModule), typeof(SectorizedTileMapModule), typeof(ConnectedZonesModule), typeof(StairsModule), typeof(NoteModule) })]
public class SchemaBehaviour : LBSBehaviour, ICloneable, IBlueprintable
